source_text: The portion of the Side Impact Zone that is vertically between the upper surface of the floor and 320 mm above the lowest point of the upper surface of the floor (see figure above) must have: a. Equivalence to minimum two (2) Steel Tubes (F.3.2.1.e) per F.4.4 b
